name: simulator
description: Browser ST841/ADuC841 simulator with built-in MCS-51 ASM and educational C51 compilers

scripts.build: npm run export:web && npm run build:run
scripts.test:asm: npm run export:web && npm run test:asm:run
scripts.test:c51: npm run export:web && npm run test:c51:run
scripts.test:language: npm run export:web && npm run test:language:run
scripts.test:runtime: npm run export:web && npm run test:runtime:run
scripts.test:compilers: npm run export:web && npm run test:asm:run && npm run test:c51:run && npm run test:language:run && npm run test:hints && npm run test:runtime:run
scripts.test: npm run test:compilers && npm run test:scope && npm run test:logic
